title: Phoenix Armor damages equipped creature at turn start

card.rawText: The equipped creature receives 10 damage at the beginning of their turns. If the equipped creature is killed, send this card to the cemetery and restore equipped creature's HP to 50%.

plan.title: Phoenix Armor damages equipped creature at turn start
plan.summary: Verify Phoenix Armor deals 10 damage to the equipped creature at the beginning of its turns.

notes: Pre-place Phoenix Armor on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
